description: Flattened AI-search index for Codex pets. Each record is intentionally redundant so retrieval tools can match natural-language queries without parsing the full catalog.

records.summary_en: Original chibi AI research assistant with chestnut hair, sharp blue-violet eyes, a white lab jacket, and skeptical lab-partner energy.
